Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Plaintiff's Notice Motion and Motion for Apportionment proceeding and for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for and with plaintiff(s): Shay-Anne Kent as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Ronald Kent, Deceased; and Kimberly Booher, as Legal Heir of Ronald Kent, Deceased.
Plaintiff's Witness Shay-Anne Kent was sworn and provided testimony in support to the court.
After hearing the testimony from the parties, the Court took the matter under submission.
Proposed Order was submitted in open court.

Date:
Order granted, and proportions as follows:
Shay-Anne Kent as Wrongful Death Heir for 90%
Kimberly Booher as Wrongful Death Heir for 10%
Attorneys' fees and costs in the amount of $1,017.00
See Scanned doc. for details of the Order.
Judgment signed by Judge Ellen Chaitin.
